entities.name: Immutability Pattern
entities.context: Architectural principle that input artifacts should never be modified

entities.name: Input Artifacts
entities.context: Source data that must remain unchanged during processing

entities.name: Output Artifacts
entities.context: New files produced by transforms rather than mutations

entities.name: Append-only History
entities.context: Technique for preserving history through additive-only changes

entities.name: Versioned Filenames
entities.context: Technique for tracking history via filename versioning

entities.name: Git
entities.context: Version control system used for preserving history through commits

relationships.context: Pattern requires input artifacts remain immutable
Pattern produces new files rather than mutations
